 {'date': '2026-03-08 22:11:17',
  'headline': 'Is It Time To Reassess Accel Entertainment (ACEL) After Mixed '
              'Returns And Fair Value Signals',
  'publisher': 'Simply Wall St.',
  'summary': 'If you are looking at Accel Entertainment and wondering whether '

  'url': 'https://finance.yahoo.com/news/time-reassess-accel-entertainment-acel-221117867.html'},
